name: Commercial Vehicle Group, Inc.
summary: Commercial Vehicle Group, Inc. (CVG) is a global provider of systems, assemblies, and components for commercial vehicle and electric vehicle markets. The company operates three segments: Global Seating (seats for MD/HD trucks, construction, agriculture), Global Electrical Systems (wire harness assemblies, cable systems), and Trim Systems and Components (plastic assemblies, mirrors, wipers). CVG manufactures in the US, Mexico, China, UK, Czech Republic, Ukraine, Morocco, Thailand, India, and Australia, serving OEMs and aftermarket customers in North America, Europe, and Asia-Pacific.

products.name: Commercial Vehicle Seats
products.description: Mechanical and air suspension seats, static seats, bus and military seats for MD/HD trucks, construction, and agriculture markets under KAB, National, Bostrom, and Stratos brands.

products.name: Wire Harness Assemblies
products.description: High and low voltage electrical wire systems including Ethernet, battery cables, and power distribution boxes for commercial, industrial, and electric vehicles.

products.name: Plastic Assemblies and Components
products.description: Thermoformed, injection molded, and RIM plastic parts including instrument panels, cab interiors, armrests, and floor systems for MD/HD trucks and power sports vehicles.

products.name: Accessories
products.description: Mirrors, wipers, and wiper systems sold under AdvancTEK, Moto Mirror, Sprague Devices, and RoadWatch brands for commercial trucks, military, and specialty vehicles.

products.name: Office Seats
products.description: Seats sold into commercial and home office furniture distribution channels in Europe and Asia-Pacific.
